title: These 11 The Best Anti-Ageing Serums Are Dermatologist Approved For A Reason
content_excerpt_3000:
While most of us don't want to stop ageing altogether, it might be true that we'd like to slow or certainly soften the effects of time on our skin.

## _Vogue_'s pick of the best anti-ageing serums at a glance:

Best retinoid serum - Medik8 Crystal Retinal 1 Serum
Best serum for wrinkles - Skinceuticals P-TIOX Anti-Wrinkle Peptide Serum
Best brightening serum - Paula's Choice 25% Vitamin C + Glutathione Clinical Serum

"When it comes to anti-ageing serums, it's all about choosing ingredients that work smarter for your skin," says dermatologist Dr [Anetta Reszko]. "The key is tailoring ingredients to your skin's tolerance and introducing actives gradually."

To help you narrow down your search for the best anti-ageing serum, we spoke to two dermatologists about what to look for in an anti-ageing serum.

In this article:
- [Jump to the products]
- [What do dermatologists recommend for ageing skin?]
- [Ingredients to look for in anti-ageing serums]
- [When should you start using an anti-aging serum?]
- [How we tested]
- [Meet the experts]

## How we tested the best anti-ageing serums

When we test and review a product, we take a holistic approach.

**Best retinoid serum:** Medik8 Crystal Retinal 1 Serum
- **Why it's _Vogue_-approved:** Any dermatologist will tell you that retinoids are a staple of a solid anti-ageing routine
- **Editor's experience**: "I recommend this to anyone who asks me which retinoid to try."
- **Key ingredients:** 0.01% retinal, squalane, sodium hyaluronate
- **Best for:** Fine lines, wrinkles, uneven texture and tone

**Best brightening serum:** Paula's Choice 25% Vitamin C + Glutathione Clinical Serum
- **Why it's _Vogue_-approved:** Vitamin C is one of the most frequently recommended antioxidants
- **Editor's experience:** "Until trying this formula, I'd avoided vitamin C serums"
- **Key ingredients:** Vitamin C (tetrahexyldecyl ascorbate), glutathione, ergothioneine
- **Best for:** Dullness, uneven tone, discolouration, dryness

**Best hydrating serum:** Elemis Pro-Collagen Future Restore Serum
- **Key ingredients:** Microalgae, collagen amino acids, squalane
- **Best for:** Fine lines, wrinkles, skin laxity, dry skin

**Best firming serum:** Chanel Le Lift Sérum
- **Key ingredients:** Peptides, peppermint, alfalfa
- **Best for:** Skin laxity, dullness

(8 more product blocks following the same structure...)
